uk.updateNote: Removal of information about Tsunami advisory following earthquake in the Philippines ('Warning and insurance' page).

ie.updateNote: The Japan Meteorological Agency is currently forecasting that Typhoon Haikui will approach the southern islands of Okinawa Prefecture from the evening of Friday 1 September (Japanese time). A High Wave warning is in place and advisories for Heavy Rain, Storm, and Storm Surge. Typhoons are often accompanied by high tides and landslides that can occur during continuous periods of heavy rain. Travell

au.updateNote: Still current at:09 July 2026 Updated:09 April 2026 Latest update:We continue to advise exercise normal safety precautions in Japan. Following legislative changes to family law, joint child custody after divorce is now possible in some cases. If you're involved in a dispute over a child or other family matter disputes, it is important to seek legal advice about your options both in Japan and in Au
